theme: SCN — Reposition SVI as a Startup Navigation System (Google Maps for Startups): Validation → Position → Value → Direction → Capital. Spec: .claude/goals/scn-startup-navigation-system.md.
northStar: Founder opens the dashboard and instantly sees Where am I (Index + Stage + Top X% percentile) and What to do Next (Next Best Action), in SCN order.
overallAssessment: All teams operating smoothly. Strategic focus this cycle: rebuild the report/analysis + dashboard around the SCN framework, with the Position percentile and Next-Best-Action navigation as the hero differentiator vs Crunchbase/PitchBook/Carta.

agentDirectives.task: Make POSITION the dashboard hero: Startup Index NN/100 + Current Stage + percentile vs AU peers ('Top X%'), placed ABOVE valuation; reorder sections to SCN sequence (Validation, Position, Value, Direction, Capital).
Build a percentile/positioning model: rank a startup's SVI against the AU cohort distribution and expose 'Top X% of AU startups' as a reusable function + API field.
Build the DIRECTION 'Next Best Action' navigation (You are here → Next → Then), Google-Maps-style, driven by the weakest SCN layer + current stage. Key differentiator vs Crunchbase/PitchBook/Carta.
Add a Funding Readiness % gauge (CAPITAL) and a Validation panel for early startups (problem/market/willingness-to-pay), surfaced per SCN sequence.
Reframe product copy/positioning across landing + dashboard + report as a 'Startup Navigation System', not a valuation/equity tool.

newFeatures: Startup Positioning Engine — Index + Stage + 'Top X% of AU startups' percentile hero
Next Best Action navigation (Google Maps style) driven by the weakest SCN layer
SCN Validation panel for early-stage founders + Funding Readiness % gauge
risksIdentified: Scope creep — keep each auto-improve change small and gated
Percentile model needs enough cohort data to be meaningful
